name: taqseet-ui
description: Shared design system for Taqseet applications

scripts.test:visual:update:linux: docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/work" -w /work mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.49.1-jammy bash -lc 'npm ci --legacy-peer-deps && cd packages/react && npx playwright install chromium && npm run test:visual -- --update-snapshots'
